---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
# RCTD
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3@active.assay='Xenium'
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3 <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))


# remove CR cells because there aren't enough of them for annotation
SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1@active.assay='RNA'
counts <- GetAssayData(SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1, assay = "RNA", slot = "counts")
cluster <- as.factor(SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1$cellltype)
names(cluster) <- colnames(SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1)
nUMI <- SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1$nCount_RNA
names(nUMI) <- colnames(SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1)
nUMI <- colSums(counts)
levels(cluster) <- gsub("/", "-", levels(cluster))
reference <- Reference(counts, cluster, nUMI)


# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.ctrl1 <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.ctrl1 <- run.RCTD(RCTD.ctrl1, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.ctrl1@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations

```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.Ctrl2"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.ctrl2 <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.ctrl2 <- run.RCTD(RCTD.ctrl2, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.ctrl2@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```

```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.Ctrl3"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.ctrl3 <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.ctrl3 <- run.RCTD(RCTD.ctrl3, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.ctrl3@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```


```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.2"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.cold1 <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.cold1 <- run.RCTD(RCTD.cold1, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.cold1@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```


```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.Cold2"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.cold2 <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.cold2 <- run.RCTD(RCTD.cold2, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.cold2@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```

```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.Cold3"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.cold3 <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.cold3 <- run.RCTD(RCTD.cold3, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.cold3@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```


```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.2.3"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.CtrlF <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.CtrlF <- run.RCTD(RCTD.CtrlF, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.CtrlF@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```


```{r}
# RCTD
# SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1<-readRDS('SC_merged_cholinergicneuron_Nos1')
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC@active.assay='Xenium'
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- JoinLayers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
# crop <- Crop(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["fov"]])
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC[["crop"]] <- crop
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.coldF"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.ColdF <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.ColdF <- run.RCTD(RCTD.ColdF, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.ColdF@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```


```{r}
# RCTD

query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.2DGM"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.2DGM <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.2DGM <- run.RCTD(RCTD.2DGM, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.2DGM@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations


```


```{r}
# RCTD
query.counts <- GetAssayData(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3, assay = "Xenium", slot = "counts")
coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3[["fov.2DGF"]], which = "centroids")
rownames(coords) <- coords$cell
coords$cell <- NULL
query <- SpatialRNA(coords, query.counts, colSums(query.counts))



# run RCTD with many cores
RCTD.2DGF <- create.RCTD(query, reference, max_cores = 8)
RCTD.2DGF <- run.RCTD(RCTD.2DGF, doublet_mode = "doublet")

annotations.df <- RCTD.2DGF@results$results_df
annotations <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations) <- rownames(annotations.df)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```



```{r}
annotations.df <- RCTD.ctrl1@results$results_df
annotations1 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations1) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.ctrl2@results$results_df
annotations2 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations2) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.ctrl3@results$results_df
annotations3 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations3) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.cold1@results$results_df
annotations4 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations4) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.cold2@results$results_df
annotations5 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations5) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.cold3@results$results_df
annotations6 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations6) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.CtrlF@results$results_df
annotations7 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations7) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.ColdF@results$results_df
annotations8 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations8) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.2DGM@results$results_df
annotations9 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations9) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations.df <- RCTD.2DGF@results$results_df
annotations10 <- annotations.df$first_type
names(annotations10) <- rownames(annotations.df)

annotations<-c(annotations1,annotations2,annotations3,annotations4,annotations5,annotations6,annotations7,annotations8,annotations9,annotations10)

merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3$predicted.celltype <- annotations
```

```{r}
saveRDS(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3,"merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3.rds")
```


#sankey plot描出

```{r}

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)

# 必要な列だけ抽出
meta_df <- merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3@meta.data[, c("predicted.celltype", "SPN_subtype")]

# factor → character（安全のため）
meta_df$predicted.celltype <- as.character(meta_df$predicted.celltype)
meta_df$SPN_subtype <- as.character(meta_df$SPN_subtype)

# NA除去
meta_df <- na.omit(meta_df)

# 組み合わせごとに頻度集計
plot_df <- meta_df %>%
  group_by(predicted.celltype, SPN_subtype) %>%
  summarise(value = n(), .groups = "drop")

plot_df_long <- plot_df %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(predicted.celltype, SPN_subtype),
                      names_to = "axis",
                      values_to = "category")
ggplot(
  links,
  aes(
    axis1 = predicted.celltype,
    axis2 = SPN_subtype,
    y = value
  )
) +
  geom_alluvium(
    aes(fill = predicted.celltype),
    width = 1/12,
    alpha = 1      
  ) +
  geom_stratum(
    width = 1/12,
    fill = "grey80",
    color = "black",
    alpha = 1       
  ) +
  geom_label(
    stat = "stratum",
    aes(label = after_stat(stratum)),
    alpha = 1       
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Predicted", "Subtype"), expand = c(.1, .1)) +
  theme_minimal()

```
